full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20941

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20941.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
at-3.1.23-13.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
at-3.1.23-13.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/at-3.1.23-13.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.1.23-13]
- Use systemd-tmpfiles for /var/spool/at directories
- Resolves: RHEL-110319
